3014760.name: Cursed House 8
3014760.description:
Cursed House 8 is a Match 3 Puzzle game. The level size has been increased by transitioning to a wide screen, making the levels more interesting. Similar to the previous installment, the game offers two gameplay modes - normal and increased difficulty. Levels differ significantly between these modes, effectively making it two games in one.

Additionally, a new feature introduced for the first time is the HINT button, providing interactive assistance in level completion by showing what needs to be done.

This game also introduces a new bonus game - Bugs.

The game includes:

2 Hidden Object scenes
7 Spot the difference scenes
20 Bug games
20 Solitaires
100 Match 3 levels (most of them are available in both hard and regular difficulty versions)
